meaning: n.<古>懊悔,后悔,[植]芸香v.后悔,悲伤,懊悔
examples: He moved at a brisk pace down the rue St. Antoine.
If thy mother knew it, Sadly, sadly, would she rue it.
Now though the doer of it be a duke's son he shall rue it!
Haifa coach Roni Levy was left to rue the late strike by the Chilean winger.
Davis was left to rue three wasted chances in the second frame, having won the first.
